mapper.sql: (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId})

choose.when: SELECT mng_no, dev_name, dev_ip, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, '' AS dev_type, (SELECT code_nm FROM tb_com_code WHERE p_code_id IN (SELECT code_id FROM tb_com_code WHERE 1=1 AND code_cd = 'DEV_TYPE') AND code_cd = dev_kind1) AS dev_kind1_str, (SELECT code_nm FROM tb_com_code WHERE p_code_id IN (SELECT code_id FROM tb_com_code WHERE code_cd = A.dev_kind1) AND code_cd = A.dev_kind2) AS dev_kind2_str FROM cm_dev10 A, nt_cfg_leaf B WHERE A.grp_no = B.sub_no AND B.grp_no IN ( SELECT nt_grp_no FROM com_auth_group_subgrp WHERE auth_grp_no = #{authGrpNo} )

SELECT CASE WHEN A.user_if_name IS NULL OR A.user_if_name = '' THEN A.if_name ELSE A.user_if_name END AS if_name, A.mng_no, A.if_idx, A.if_alias, A.line_width_val AS line_width, A.status FROM (SELECT CD20.*, CASE WHEN CD20.user_line_width_poll = 1 THEN COALESCE(CD20.user_line_width, 0) ELSE COALESCE(CD20.line_width, 0) END AS line_width_val FROM cm_dev20 CD20) A WHERE A.mng_no = #{mngNo}

SELECT name AS if_name, mng_no, if_idx, name AS if_alias, COALESCE(band_width, 0) AS line_width, '' AS status FROM nt_svr_network WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo} AND last_upd BETWEEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '15 minutes' AND CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

when.test: _parameter.containsKey('devKind1') and devKind1 != null and devKind1 == 'VSVR' and _parameter.containsKey('devKind2') and devKind2 != null and devKind2 == 'VHOST_ESXI'

choose.when: SELECT device_name AS if_name, mng_no, 0 AS if_idx, device_name AS if_alias, 0 AS line_width, '' AS status FROM esxi_hostsystem_pnic WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}
choose.otherwise: SELECT network_name AS if_name, mng_no, 0 AS if_idx, network_name AS if_alias, 0 AS line_width, '' AS status FROM esxi_virtualmachine_network WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}

mapper.update:
UPDATE cm_topo_link SET
mng_no1 = #{mngNo1}, if_idx1 = #{ifIdx1}, link_name1 = #{ifName1}, line_width1 = #{lineWidth1}, traffic_type1 = #{trafficType1}, evt_level1 = 1,
mng_no1 = NULL, if_idx1 = NULL, link_name1 = NULL, line_width1 = NULL, traffic_type1 = 'I', traffic1 = NULL, evt_level1 = NULL,
mng_no2 = #{mngNo2}, if_idx2 = #{ifIdx2}, link_name2 = #{ifName2}, line_width2 = #{lineWidth2}, traffic_type2 = #{trafficType2}, evt_level2 = 1,
mng_no2 = NULL, if_idx2 = NULL, link_name2 = NULL, line_width2 = NULL, traffic_type2 = 'I', traffic2 = NULL, evt_level2 = NULL,
polling_color = (SELECT polling_color FROM cm_topo_user WHERE user_id = ) WHERE user_id = AND link_no = #{linkNo}
mapper.select: SELECT A.mng_no, A.if_idx, CASE WHEN B.user_dev_name IS NULL OR B.user_dev_name = '' THEN B.dev_name ELSE B.user_dev_name END AS dev_name, if_name, A.line_width, if_alias, status, traffic, COALESCE(traffic_type, 'I') AS traffic_type FROM cm_topo_link_multi A, cm_dev10 B, cm_dev20 C WHERE user_id = AND item_no = #{itemNo} AND link_no = #{linkNo} AND A.mng_no = B.mng_no AND A.mng_no = C.mng_no AND A.if_idx = C.if_idx ORDER BY dev_name, if_name
